terms.definition: A group of people who are related to each other and care for one another. Families can be big or small.
terms.exampleUsage: My family has five members - my parents, my sister, my brother, and me.

terms.definition: A brother or sister. Siblings share the same parents.
terms.exampleUsage: I have two siblings - an older brother and a younger sister.

terms.definition: The process of legally taking a child into your family and raising them as your own when their birth parents cannot take care of them.
terms.exampleUsage: The couple adopted a baby girl and gave her a loving home.

terms.definition: When two people decide to become life partners and join their families together through a ceremony.
terms.exampleUsage: After the marriage, our family became bigger with new relatives.

terms.definition: A family where one parent raises the children. The parent takes care of everything with help from other relatives.
terms.exampleUsage: In a single-parent family, the parent works extra hard to look after the children.

terms.definition: A family that includes not just parents and children, but also grandparents, uncles, aunts, and cousins.
terms.exampleUsage: Our extended family meets every year during Diwali at grandfather's house.

terms.definition: A special event or gathering to mark a happy occasion like a birthday, festival, or wedding.
terms.exampleUsage: The whole family came together for the celebration of Grandpa's 70th birthday.

terms.definition: A duty or task that someone is expected to take care of. In a family, everyone has responsibilities.
terms.exampleUsage: Keeping my room clean is my responsibility at home.

terms.definition: A traditional way of doing things that has been followed by a family or community for a long time.
terms.exampleUsage: It is our family custom to eat together at the dinner table every evening.

terms.definition: All the people who live together in one house and share daily tasks like cooking, cleaning, and eating.
terms.exampleUsage: There are six people in our household including my grandparents.
